concerns.text: T019 implements FR-006 as hard flag 'UNSUITABLE_FOR_BINARY_CLASSIFICATION' but T022 implements class weighting/SMOTE mitigation allowing pipeline to continue. Plan.md states 'imbalance flag is a soft flag, not a hard stop' contradicting FR-006's 'unsuitable for binary classification' hard requirement. Tasks must not silently relax FR-006.

T011 implements descriptor computation but does not explicitly implement Constitution Principle VI checksum trigger requirement: 'Any change to descriptor calculation pipeline MUST trigger a new checksum entry for derived feature files in data/'

T020 implements model training but does not explicitly address Constitution Principle VII requirement: 'explicit hyper-parameter specifications recorded in code/' and 'models failing >80% accuracy MUST be documented with explanation'

T031 implements reproducibility check but does not explicitly address Constitution Principle V: 'Every artifact under this project carries a content hash' and 'updated_at timestamp update requirements for all artifacts'
T007 sets up environment config but does not explicitly verify Constitution Principle I: 'Every notebook or script under code/ is runnable end-to-end without manual intervention'

T039 adds validation_limitation_note field but does not explicitly address Constitution Principle IV: 'Every figure, statistic, or interpretation in the paper MUST trace back to exactly one row in this project's data/ and one block in this project's code/'
T027 implements sensitivity analysis but does not explicitly confirm FR-005's exact δ threshold variations {0.01, 0.05, 0.1} - should specify these values in task description
